title: medicago lupulina subsp. willdenowiana
intro: Medicago lupulina subsp. willdenowiana is a subspecies of the yellow trefoil plant, belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with a rich history of use in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
